name: Abandoned Water Treatment Plant
text:
Abandoned Water Treatment Plant enters the battlefield tapped unless you control a creature with a sludge counter on it.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.
{2}, {T}: Put a sludge counter on target creature you control. The machinery still runs. Nobody's signed off on shutting it down because nobody's gone back inside.
flavorText: Condemned in '91. The condemnation notice is also condemned now.
